text: You are the average of the five people you spend the most time with.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Formal education will make you a living; self-education will make you a fortune.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Don't wish it were easier. Wish you were better.
author: Jim Rohn

text: If you really want to do something, you'll find a way. If you don't, you'll find an excuse.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Work hard at your job and you can make a living. Work hard on yourself and you can make a fortune.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
author: Jim Rohn

text: If you don't like how things are, change it. You are not a tree.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Those who will not read are no better off than those who cannot read.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The difference between where you are today and where you'll be five years from now will be found in the quality of books you've read.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Success is something you attract by the person you become.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Leadership is the challenge to be something more than average.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Success is the natural consequence of consistently applying basic fundamentals.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Each of us has two choices: to be less than we can be, or to become everything we are capable of.
author: Jim Rohn

text: You don't get paid for the hour. You get paid for the value you bring to the hour.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Happiness is not something you postpone for the future; it is something you design for the present.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The ultimate reason for setting goals is to become the person it takes to achieve them.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Success is nothing more than a few simple disciplines, practiced every day.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Motivation alone is not enough. If you have an idiot and you motivate him, you now have a motivated idiot.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Don't wish for less problems; wish for more skills.
author: Jim Rohn

text: It isn’t what the book costs. It’s what it will cost you if you don’t read it.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Learn to work harder on yourself than you do on your job.
author: Jim Rohn

text: We generally change ourselves for one of two reasons: inspiration or desperation.
author: Jim Rohn

text: How long should you try? Until.
author: Jim Rohn

text: If you don't design your own life plan, chances are you'll fall into someone else's plan.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Unless you change how you are, you will always have what you've got.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Don't just read the easy stuff. You may be entertained by it, but you will never grow from it.
author: Jim Rohn

text: For things to change, you have to change.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Poor people have big TVs. Rich people have big libraries.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Your level of success will rarely exceed your level of personal development.
author: Jim Rohn

text: You have two choices: make a living or design a life.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Motivation is what gets you started. Habit is what keeps you going.
author: Jim Rohn

text: We must all suffer one of two things: the pain of discipline or the pain of regret.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The challenge of leadership is to be strong, but not rude; kind, but not weak.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Let others lead small lives, but not you.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The worst thing one can do is not to try.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Successful people have libraries. The rest have big screen TVs.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Learn how to be happy with what you have while you pursue all that you want.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Don't let your learning lead to knowledge. Let your learning lead to action.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Miss a meal if you have to, but don't miss a book.
author: Jim Rohn

text: When you know what you want and you want it bad enough, you'll find a way.
author: Jim Rohn

text: If you are not willing to risk the unusual, you will have to settle for the ordinary.
author: Jim Rohn

text: The greatest gift you can give somebody is your own personal development.
author: Jim Rohn

text: You must take personal responsibility.
author: Jim Rohn

text: One of the greatest gifts you can give to anyone is your attention.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Excuses are the nails used to build a house of failure.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Happiness is not by chance, but by choice.
author: Jim Rohn

text: Success is doing ordinary things extraordinarily well.
author: Jim Rohn
